item_specifications.special_feature: Adjustable, Comfortable, Durable, Lockable, Non Toxic, Secure, Ventilated

about_item: 【Assemble with Ease】Inside Dimensions: 36"L X23.0"W X25.0"H, Overall Dimensions: 38.3"L x 25.4"W x 27.7"H. Choosing the right crate size is vital to ensure your dog’s safety and comfort.
【Sturdy Structure】Heavy duty frame made of durable corrosion-resistant steel. The quality particle board top and metal bars are strong enough to ensure that your naughty pup can be safe inside.

【Safety Guaranteed】 The metal coating and board surface are non-toxic if the dog chewed or licked. The sliding latches on the front door and side door prevent the high anxiety dogs from opening the door and escaping.

【Ventilation& Easy to Clean】 The dog kennel is surrounded by round bars, which provide good air circulation and visibility. Dogs can be very messy and can sometimes have accidents, just open the front doors or side door and clean it with a cloth.

【Furniture-Style】This dog crate can be used as an elegant end table while providing a safe area for your furry friend. The classic rustic vintage style is able to blend in and complement virtually any decor theme.

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate furniture to be well-made and durable, noting it will hold up for destructive pups and last for years. They appreciate its appearance, saying it blends well with living rooms, and find it easy to assemble with good instructions. The size is perfect for large dogs, and they consider it worth the price. The latches receive mixed reviews - while some praise the side entrance with sturdy latches, others find them a significant pain.

authors_reviews.title: Best Furniture Dog Crate!
authors_reviews.text: This thing was packaged like a nice handbag with Lego level building instructions. Numbers on the bags and all the tools you need. Do yourself a favor and lineup all the holes before you start screwing. I realized far too late that I had a panel upside down and had to undo a lot of screws to correct it.Seriously impressed with the build and thoughtful design. The white is such a nice design option. This thing is heavy and well built. The floor is lifted to the same level as the bars which means less hair and junk will get stuck in the kennel. The locking mechanism is easy to close and even features an extra set of spring locks on the inside of the door that allows it to open on both sides. I can’t imagine any houdinis making their way out of this thing.I wasn’t planning on using a kennel long term but my cocker spaniel had other plans so I finally broke down and bought a couple nice kennels. So glad I did. Love the look, check out the before and after, so much better! My cocker spaniel fits in the medium sized kennel and my boxer fits in the XL with plenty of room. They sleep in the XL together at night and separately during the day.
authors_reviews.author: SleeplessinKC

authors_reviews.title: Must buy!
authors_reviews.text: Very sturdy, easy to build and I am not strong anymore. I have two and they look great and you can use the top to store things! Please forgive the mess. I also have covers for them.
authors_reviews.author: Tracey A. Devlin

authors_reviews.title: Great investment!
authors_reviews.text: I have two medium size dogs that need to be kenneled on and off throughout the day and they also sleep in their crates. The crates are housed in our small livingroom; therefore they need to be somewhat attractive. The rehomerance crates arrived days before the estimated delivery date. Each box was extremely heavy although very very well packaged. The parts were all labeled and extra parts and tools were provided. Assembly was so easy although an extra set of hands would be helpful. I have had other dog crates and this is a quality product. Very sturdy yet attractive. My dogs love their new crates. I’m so glad I made this investment!
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Great kennel, except...
authors_reviews.text: After writing the review below, I found two additional latches that someone whom I won’t name, did not tnink were necessary. They were! Door problem solved!!! Five stars and I may buy the bigger one if the grow bigger than we think they will!!!Looks great, solid construction, big enough for two 45 lb. dogs (who are very bonded and sleep on top of each other, but still there is room for them both), went together easily and everything lined up first try. HOWEVER...a few things to know - it weights about 75 pounds assembled, and you DEFINITELY need 2 people to do it (we had three). While you could do it sitting on the floor (if you are young enough to get back up off the floor, which we are not!), we cut off the top of the box, laid in on the bed, and assembled it there which also worked well. Took two adults to lift it down when done. Slides well on included feet. Strongly suggest that you use some twine or long twist ties on the doors before assembly or else they will be banging in the head every 2 minutes. And know which door you want to use, and which end and way you want it to open. Now the bad news...while the dogs went in no problems, rearranged the bedding to suit and settle right down, and 4:15 in the morning we were woke by excited puppy kisses and deadly tail beating and they settle down between us on the bed. We realized when we put it together that the slide locks did not hold the doors tightly to the face of the kennel, but we tugged on them and they did not open or release the doors so they appeared secure. It appears though that all those treat puzzles we give them taught them more than we thought! So great crate, nice looking furniture piece, but we will be modifying the latch today!
authors_reviews.author: Grandma B.

authors_reviews.title: Good Crate
authors_reviews.text: I have 2 of these and they are heavy, sturdy and easy to put together. I had an issue with my second crate and their customer service dept was quick to respond and help solve my issue. These are nice looking crates and I would recommend.
authors_reviews.author: G

authors_reviews.title: Stylish and Functional Kennel for Two Dogs
authors_reviews.text: We absolutely love this double dog kennel. It has become both a functional and stylish part of our living room. The construction is sturdy and high-quality, and it easily accommodates our two dogs with plenty of space and comfort. What we appreciate most is how well it blends in with our home décor, it looks more like a piece of furniture than a kennel.The smooth top gives us extra surface space for décor and media devices, and the doors open and close securely with no issues. Our dogs have taken to it quickly, and it keeps everything looking neat and organized. This has been one of our favorite purchases for both practicality and appearance.
authors_reviews.author: Ryan

authors_reviews.title: Sturdy, Convenient Design & Dog-Approved
authors_reviews.text: I purchased this kennel for my 6-year-old Boston Terrier, and he took to it immediately! It’s super sturdy, surprisingly easy to put together, and feels like great quality for the price. I especially love the doors on each side—it makes placement so much easier. Definitely a great buy! Very durable and would purchase again.
authors_reviews.author: Kenzie Zapotoschny
